message:
feat(fastapi-core): add logging, testing utilities, and extend extractors

Continue building out the FastAPI-style framework with essential components:

Logging (logging.rs):
- Structured logging with tracing integration
- Request/response logging middleware
- Log level configuration per route/handler
- Context propagation for distributed tracing

Testing utilities (testing.rs):
- TestClient for integration testing without HTTP server
- Request builders with fluent API
- Response assertion helpers
- Mock request context generation

Extractor extensions (extract.rs):
- Additional extractor types for common patterns
- Improved error messages for extraction failures
- Validation integration hooks

Middleware improvements (middleware.rs):
- Better error handling in middleware chain
- Middleware ordering guarantees
- Request-scoped state management

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
